title: Hoppers Additions
description: Hoppers Additions expends Minecraft's automation capabilities by introducing a bunch of new specialized hoppers.
body:
Hoppers Additions expends Minecraft's automation capabilities by introducing a bunch of new specialized hoppers. 

The mod currently feature 6 unique hoppers (more will be added).

- Reinforced hopper: Moves items twice as fast.
- Mining hopper: Can be enchanted and mines the blocks on top of it.
- Dropping hopper: drops items on the ground.
- Magnetic hopper: Can collect items in a range around itself.
- Filter hopper: Can only take a certain type of item.
- Monster/Animal hopper: Move Monster/Animal
- Batch hopper: Move item in batch
